kind: Descriptive — what happened this season, weighted by floor time (not a projection).

definition.rate_form: Per-game on-court impact, weighted by her share of team floor time.
definition.volume_form: That per-game rate accumulated across the games she has played.
definition.impact_rating: Our on-court impact rating (how much better the team plays with her on).
definition.min_share: Her share of the game's floor time (minutes played out of the full game).
definition.context_earned_law: Floor-time share is exposure only — it never re-adjusts the rating.
definition.thin: Flagged when her on-court basis is still thin (early season) or under 5 games.
